title.en: It's all the same! 다 똑같아! 결국엔 다 비슷해!

description.en: When there are many choices but you feel there's no real difference! Practice expressing your thoughts with 다 똑같아 and 결국엔 다 비슷해.
description.ko: 여러 가지 선택지가 있지만 실제로는 큰 차이가 없다고 느껴질 때! 다 똑같아와 결국엔 다 비슷해를 사용해 무심하면서도 명확한 내 생각을 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Indifference. Comparison. Similarity. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 오늘 방송 끝나고 마트 가서 생수 좀 사려고 하는데요.
content.translation: John. I'm planning to go to the mart after the show and buy some bottled water.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 비싼 프리미엄 생수를 살까요? 아니면 그냥 제일 저렴한 걸 살까요?
content.translation: Should I buy expensive premium water? Or just the cheapest one?

content.speaker: John
content.text: It makes no difference. 다 똑같아.
content.translation: It makes no difference. It's all the same.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 물맛은 결국엔 다 비슷해요. 그냥 싼 거 사세요!
content.translation: The taste of water is all similar in the end. Just buy the cheap one!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 에이. 존은 너무 섬세하지 못하네요! 물마다 목 넘김이 얼마나 다른데요.
content.translation: Geez. You're not delicate at all. John! The way the water goes down is so different for each one.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 다 똑같아. This is very simple and useful.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 두 개 이상의 대상을 비교했을 때 겉모습이나 본질이 다르지 않다는 뜻이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It means that when comparing two or more objects. their appearance or essence is not different.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 고민할 가치가 없을 정도로 차이가 없을 때 자주 써요.
content.translation: It's often used when there's no difference to the point where it's not worth worrying about.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 다 똑같아.
content.translation: It's all the same.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then what about 결국엔 다 비슷해.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이건 처음에는 달라 보일 수 있지만. 끝에 가서는 별 차이가 없다는 뜻이에요.
content.translation: This means that even if it looks different at first. there is not much difference in the end.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 제품의 기능이나 사람의 성격에 대해서 이야기할 때 많이 사용하는 리액션이죠.
content.translation: It's a reaction often used when talking about product functions or people's personalities.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 결국엔 다 비슷해.
content.translation: Eventually it's all similar.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine we are choosing a smartphone case.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 이 케이스는 오만 원이고 이건 오천 원인데. 디자인이 거의 똑같아요.
content.translation: John. this case is fifty thousand won and this one is five thousand won. but the designs are almost the same.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 비싼 게 더 튼튼할까요? 어떤 걸 사는 게 좋을까요?
content.translation: Will the expensive one be more durable? Which one should I buy?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 제가 보기엔 다 똑같아요. 브랜드 이름값 때문에 비싼 거예요.
content.translation: In my opinion. it's all the same. It's expensive because of the brand name.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그래도 오만 원짜리는 뭔가 특별한 기능이 있지 않을까요?
content.translation: Still. wouldn't the fifty thousand won one have some special function?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 써보면 알겠지만 결국엔 다 비슷해요. 휴대폰 보호하는 건 다 똑같거든요!
content.translation: You'll know once you use it. but eventually it's all similar. Protecting the phone is all the same!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 듣고 보니 그렇네요. 그냥 저렴한 걸로 사야겠어요!
content.translation: Now that I hear it. you're right. I should just buy the cheap one!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Don't let marketing tricks confuse you.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 겉포장에 속지 말고 본질을 보는 눈이 필요해요.
content.translation: Right. You need an eye to see the essence without being fooled by the packaging.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 표현들로 여러분의 쿨한 통찰력을 보여주세요!
content.translation: Show off your cool insight with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "all the same" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 다 똑같아! It's all the same!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 결국엔 다 비슷해! Eventually it's all similar!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그게 그거야! It's the same thing!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 거기서 거기야! It's about the same!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 별 차이 없어! There's not much difference!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 선택의 순간에 너무 고민하지 말고 가볍게 외쳐보세요. 다 똑같아!
content.translation: Everyone. don't worry too much at the moment of choice today and shout it out lightly. It's all the same!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 여러 번 시도했지만 결국 성공했어요. (I tried several times and succeeded in the end.)
두 제품 사이에 큰 차이는 없어요. (There's no big difference between the two products.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be cheap. To be affordable
vocabulary.example: 이 시장은 물건값이 정말 저렴해요. (The prices of goods in this market are very cheap.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be delicate. To be detailed
vocabulary.example: 존은 성격이 아주 섬세한 편이에요. (John has a very delicate personality.)
가격에 비해 품질이 정말 좋네요. (The quality is really good compared to the price.)
이 스마트폰은 새로운 기능이 아주 많아요. (This smartphone has many new functions.)
